use_cases: Displaying premium feature highlights with ambient sparkle animations
Showcasing achievements or celebration moments on dashboards
Creating visually engaging product showcase cards
Adding visual interest to hero sections or call-to-action areas
ai_summary: A decorative card component featuring ambient sparkle animations that randomly spawn and fade across the card surface. The sparkles use opacity and scale animations with staggered timing, creating a subtle, premium feel. Supports light and dark modes, includes customizable sparkle count and animation duration, making it suitable for highlighting features, achievements, or premium content in SaaS, fintech, or e-commerce applications.
